summary: Add 1 Enoch (Charles 1917) entry to manifest + verify acquire.py
description:
Append [[source]] entry to sources/manifest.toml:

id = "enoch-charles-1917"
tradition = "jewish_mysticism"
label = "The Book of Enoch (1 Enoch, Charles translation)"
url = "https://sacred-texts.com/bib/boe/index.htm"
format = "html_multi"
license = "public_domain"
translator = "R.H. Charles"
notes = "Charles 1917. 113 chapter files boe000.htm-boe112.htm, contiguous sequential numbering. Watchers narrative (chs. 1-36) is the proto-Gnostic substrate for archons/emanation_hierarchy concepts already in corpus."

Tradition is 'jewish_mysticism' (existing — sits with Zohar/merkabah), not a new 'second_temple_apocalyptic' bucket.

OPEN: Charles 1917 preserves editorial brackets [[ ]] (Greek-only) and [[[[ ]]]] (Ethiopic-only). Check whether existing chunker tolerates these or strips/normalizes them. May need a preprocessing pass — decide during implementation.
